name: hillstate-type-guide
description: Hillstate Songpa The Grid type guide.
author: Hillstate

scripts.build: tsc && node scripts/validate-client-content.mjs public/client && vite build && node scripts/prune-dist.mjs web && node scripts/validate-client-content.mjs dist/client && node scripts/copy-404.mjs
scripts.build:electron: tsc && node scripts/validate-client-content.mjs public/client && cross-env BASE_PATH=./ vite build && node scripts/prune-dist.mjs electron && node scripts/validate-client-content.mjs dist/client
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "npm:dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron electron/main.cjs"
scripts.electron:dist:all: npm run electron:dist:mac && npm run electron:dist:win
